description_long: This is a low-top athletic shoe featuring a predominantly white upper with a red heel collar and accents. The shoe has a lace-up closure with white laces and a perforated toe box for breathability. The midsole and outsole are tan, with visible wear and dirt, suggesting outdoor use. The interior lining is red, and there is a white circular logo on the heel collar. The shoe appears to be made of synthetic leather, rubber, and fabric, with a cushioned insole for comfort. The overall design is sporty and functional, suitable for urban environments.
description: A white and red low-top athletic shoe with a tan sole, lace-up closure, and visible wear, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the red interior lining, white laces, and perforated toe box.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the red heel collar, white upper, and tan outsole with visible tread.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the white upper, tan sole, and some scuff marks on the toe area.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the lacing system, perforated toe box, and overall shoe shape.
attribute_logo: white circular logo on the red heel collar
